emails.subject: RE: NG deal in California
emails.body: RE: NG deal in California who wrote the market commentary are at the bottom of this and who wrote the rest?

emails.subject: RE: NG deal in California
emails.body: not much from customers lately. Customers waiting for market to stabilize before doing any hedging

emails.subject: RE: NG deal in California
emails.body: custy interest from sell side? or buy? sounds like the producers are pretty hedged? what do you think of the fact that production is disappointing? that fact is keeping some from selling more (my guys).. but i argue that its already priced into the curve.. and economic outlook overwhelms..

emails.subject: RE: NG deal in California
emails.body: expect some producer selling if/when mrkt stabilizes. what production data are you looking at?
